human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for restaurant-specific guest-recovery boundary discipline, booking and payment mismatch behavior, delegated recovery handling, service-charge and refund-exception posture, food-safety escalation, fraud-sensitive routing, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and retail-consumer-and-hospitality research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for service-support-and-resolution plus retail-consumer-and-hospitality are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to restaurant guest-recovery handling, including service-failure classification, order and reservation review, delegated recovery actions, and communication packaging without pricing, front-office, fraud, or food-safety authority drift.

Authority sources cover fee disclosure, delivery-platform consumer protection, payment-dispute boundaries, menu disclosure, food-safety workflow expectations, and fraud-sensitive identity handling with refresh and decay rules.
Scenario set covers missing evidence, booking and payment mismatches, policy exceptions, repeat failures, fraud and safety conditions, conflicting policy, high-volume intake, and tenant fact gaps.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdictional, reservation-policy, delivery-platform, processor, and tenant differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
